name: M-62
events: 7 Aug 1942 M-62 fires two torpedoes against a group of German barges, the barge F 136 reported being missed south of Sudak, Crimea.
17 Dec 1942 M-62 fires two torpedoes against the Romanian merchant Durostor (1309 GRT) in position 45°54'N, 30°29'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
28 Feb 1944 M-62 fires two torpedoes against a German barge in position 46°01'N, 31°31'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
22 Apr 1944 M-62 fires two torpedoes against the Romanian merchant Arendal (5695 GRT) in position 43°52'N, 31°11'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
3 May 1944 M-62 fires two torpedoes against the German tug Junak south-west of Cape Kherson, Crimea in position 44°33'N, 32°13'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
11 May 1944 M-62 fires two torpedoes against the Romanian auxiliary minelayer Dacia in position 44°41'N, 31°33'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
